# Previously — Agent Documentation (llms.txt)
#
# Previously is a lightweight cloud agent with episodic memory.
# Docs live at /docs (en/zh), markdown in content/docs/.
#
# Index for AI tools (Claude Code, Cursor, etc.) — one link per page,
# with a short label so an agent can read what it needs on-demand.

## Overview
- Introduction: /en/docs/introduction (content/docs/en/introduction.md)
- Why Previously: /en/docs/why (content/docs/en/why.md)

## Concepts
- The Timeline: /en/docs/timeline (content/docs/en/timeline.md)
- Slices: /en/docs/slices (content/docs/en/slices.md)
- Strands: /en/docs/strands (content/docs/en/strands.md)
- Memory Model: /en/docs/memory-model (content/docs/en/memory-model.md)
- Recall: /en/docs/recall (content/docs/en/recall.md)

## Guides
- Getting Started: /en/docs/getting-started (content/docs/en/getting-started.md)
- Self-hosting: /en/docs/self-hosting (content/docs/en/self-hosting.md)

## Reference
- Configuration: /en/docs/configuration (content/docs/en/configuration.md)
- Architecture: /en/docs/architecture (content/docs/en/architecture.md)
- FAQ: /en/docs/faq (content/docs/en/faq.md)
